description: User scrolls down the list of study opportunities to view more options.
User continues scrolling down, bringing 'In Person' and 'Diary Study' cards into view.
User scrolls back up to the top of the 'Explore' section.
The screen transitions from the prototype view to a dark overlay containing text feedback.
frame_description: A dark screen appears with the text 'I noticed' visible.

description: User hovers over the browser tab for 'Smart Filters Mobile App', displaying a tab info tooltip.
interaction_target: Smart Filters Mobile App browser tab

description: User moves the cursor over the 'Video Call' study opportunity card.
User moves the cursor down to hover over the 'In Person' study opportunity card.
